Uses of Class
neqsim.process.safety.inventory.TrappedInventoryCalculator

Packages that use TrappedInventoryCalculator
Package
Description
neqsim.process.safety.inventory
 
neqsim.process.safety.scenario
Automatic scenario generation for safety analysis.

  • Uses of TrappedInventoryCalculator in neqsim.process.safety.inventory

    Methods in neqsim.process.safety.inventory that return TrappedInventoryCalculator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    TrappedInventoryCalculator
    TrappedInventoryCalculator.addEquipmentVolume(String equipmentTag, double volumeM3, double liquidFillFraction, DocumentEvidence evidence)
    Adds a documented equipment or vessel volume.
    TrappedInventoryCalculator
    TrappedInventoryCalculator.addPipeSegment(String segmentId, double internalDiameterM, double lengthM, double liquidFillFraction, DocumentEvidence evidence)
    Adds a documented pipe segment from diameter and length.
    TrappedInventoryCalculator
    TrappedInventoryCalculator.addPipeSegment(String segmentId, double internalDiameter, String diameterUnit, double length, String lengthUnit, double liquidFillFraction, DocumentEvidence evidence)
    Adds a documented pipe segment from diameter and length in engineering units.
    TrappedInventoryCalculator
    TrappedInventoryCalculator.addVolumeSegment(String segmentId, double volume, String volumeUnit, double liquidFillFraction, DocumentEvidence evidence)
    Adds a documented volume segment using an engineering volume unit.
    TrappedInventoryCalculator
    TrappedInventoryCalculator.setFallbackLiquidDensity(double densityKgPerM3)
    Sets fallback liquid density used when no liquid phase is present in the representative fluid.
    TrappedInventoryCalculator
    TrappedInventoryCalculator.setFluid(SystemInterface fluid)
    Sets the representative fluid for all inventory segments.
    TrappedInventoryCalculator
    TrappedInventoryCalculator.setOperatingConditions(double pressureBara, double temperatureK)
    Sets operating pressure in bara and temperature in K.
    TrappedInventoryCalculator
    TrappedInventoryCalculator.setOperatingConditions(double pressure, String pressureUnit, double temperature, String temperatureUnit)
    Sets operating pressure and temperature for the trapped inventory.

    Methods in neqsim.process.safety.scenario with parameters of type TrappedInventoryCalculator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.trappedInventory(TrappedInventoryCalculator inventoryCalculator)
    Calculates and uses an evidence-linked trapped inventory result.
